subcodes.first_line: O thou who turnest thy face towards God! Turn thy gaze to the Kingdom of Abhá and beseech the Concourse on High. Then open thy tongue in prayer [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مقبل الی الله توجه بملکوت ابهی کن و توسل بملا اعلی پس زبان بگشا و مناجات
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for praise and gratitude, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for nearness to God, @spiritual transformation
